scenario.title: Agent briefing as default PR review view
steps: Enter review mode from a PR inbox notification
Verify briefing view is the default (not raw diff)
Verify briefing summary text is visible
Verify flagged files with risk chips and inline hunks
Verify tab toggle shows Briefing and Raw diff options
Verify clicking Raw diff tab switches to the diff viewer
Verify clicking Briefing tab returns to briefing view
Verify boilerplate section can be expanded to show collated files
Press Escape and verify review mode closes

assertions.description: Briefing view is the default in review mode (not raw diff)
Briefing summary is visible with analysis text
Flagged files are visible with risk chips and inline diff hunks
Tab toggle shows both Briefing and Raw diff options
Clicking Raw diff tab switches to the raw diff view
Clicking Briefing tab returns to the briefing view
Boilerplate section is present and can be expanded

prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence

**Change: Agent briefing first; raw diff as the fallback**

### What changed

The PR review mode now opens with an **agent briefing** as the default view instead of the raw diff. The briefing:

- Shows a summary of what changed, why, and where risk is
- Displays **flagged files inline** with risk level chips (high/medium/low) and diff hunks
- **Collapses boilerplate** changes (formatting, imports, lock files) into a one-line summary like `+240/-30 formatting & imports - expand`
- One click on **Raw diff** tab switches to the full unified diff viewer
- One click on **Briefing** tab returns to the briefing view

### Acceptance criteria verified

1. **Default: agent briefing** - Review mode opens to `ReviewBriefingView`, not `ReviewDiffView`
2. **Flagged hunks inline** - Files matching high/medium risk patterns show inline diff lines with add/remove coloring
3. **Boilerplate collapsed** - Lock files, formatting-only files, import-only files collapsed into expandable section
4. **One action switches to full raw diff** - Pill toggle in header switches between Briefing and Raw diff
5. **Briefing derives only from diff content** - Classification uses pure heuristic pattern matching in `diff-analyzer.ts`
